name: Creation of a User with Superuser Privileges
notes: This rule detects the creation of a user account that has a uid or gid of 0. This indicates a Superuser.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Account Added
when the event matches Target Username (custom) is not any of root
when the event matches "User ID" = 0 OR "Group ID" = 0 AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Creation of a User with Superuser Privileges on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Account Added
AND when the event matches Target Username (custom) is not any of root
AND when the event matches "User ID" = 0 OR "Group ID" = 0 AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Creation of a User with Superuser Privileges
Event description: Detects the creation of a user account that has a uid or gid of 0.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Target Username (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
